originContent: A redesign of the various reader menus in KOReader, including the Dictionary Quick Lookup popup and Reader Highlight menu.
translatedContent: A redesign of the various reader menus in KOReader, including the Dictionary Quick Lookup popup and Reader Highlight menu.

originContent: Includes an option to show 'unknown' buttons (buttons not changed by this plugin) in the Reader Highlight menu:
translatedContent: Includes an option to show 'unknown' buttons (buttons not changed by this plugin) in the Reader Highlight menu:

originContent: This plugin also provides custom UI for other plugins, such as [WordReference plugin](https://github.com/kristianpennacchia/wordreference.koplugin) and [AI Assistant plugin](https://github.com/omer-faruq/assistant.koplugin).
translatedContent: This plugin also provides custom UI for other plugins, such as [WordReference plugin](https://github.com/kristianpennacchia/wordreference.koplugin) and [AI Assistant plugin](https://github.com/omer-faruq/assistant.koplugin).

originContent: - Copy the `zzz-readermenuredesign.koplugin` folder to your KOReader `plugins` directory on the device.
translatedContent: - Copy the `zzz-readermenuredesign.koplugin` folder to your KOReader `plugins` directory on the device.

originContent: - **All of the icons are hazard (⚠️) symbols.**
translatedContent: - **All of the icons are hazard (⚠️) symbols.**

originContent: - As of version v1.0.5, the icons should be installed automatically, however if you are still encountering this issue, try manually copying the icons from the `zzz-readermenuredesign.koplugin` folder and putting them into the KOReader icons folder `/koreader/resources/icons`.
translatedContent: - As of version v1.0.5, the icons should be installed automatically, however if you are still encountering this issue, try manually copying the icons from the `zzz-readermenuredesign.koplugin` folder and putting them into the KOReader icons folder `/koreader/resources/icons`.

originContent: - This can happen on some devices with older versions of this plugin. Try deleting this plugins SVG icons from `/koreader/resources/icons/mdlight` and replace them with the PNG icons from the [latest release](https://github.com/kristianpennacchia/zzz-readermenuredesign.koplugin/releases/latest), then **restart KOReader**.
translatedContent: - This can happen on some devices with older versions of this plugin. Try deleting this plugins SVG icons from `/koreader/resources/icons/mdlight` and replace them with the PNG icons from the [latest release](https://github.com/kristianpennacchia/zzz-readermenuredesign.koplugin/releases/latest), then **restart KOReader**.

originContent: - Open Menu → Tools 🛠️ → More tools → Reader Menu Redesign → Show Unknown Buttons In Reader Highlight Menu.
translatedContent: - Open Menu → Tools 🛠️ → More tools → Reader Menu Redesign → Show Unknown Buttons In Reader Highlight Menu.

originContent: - This will toggle showing/hiding the 'unknown' buttons (buttons without special handling in this plugin) in the Reader Highlight menu.
translatedContent: - This will toggle showing/hiding the 'unknown' buttons (buttons without special handling in this plugin) in the Reader Highlight menu.

originContent: - Open Menu → Tools 🛠️ → More tools → Reader Menu Redesign → Show Nav Buttons In Dict Quick Lookup.
translatedContent: - Open Menu → Tools 🛠️ → More tools → Reader Menu Redesign → Show Nav Buttons In Dict Quick Lookup.

originContent: - This will toggle showing/hiding the 'nav' buttons in the Dict Quick Lookup to navigate between dictionaries, wikipedia entires, etc.
translatedContent: - This will toggle showing/hiding the 'nav' buttons in the Dict Quick Lookup to navigate between dictionaries, wikipedia entries, etc.

originContent: - Alternatively: You can simply swipe left-to-right to navigate instead, but these buttons are more useful for PC/Mac.
translatedContent: - Alternatively: You can simply swipe left-to-right to navigate instead, but these buttons are more useful for PC/Mac.
